infeasible_scenarios.scenarios: Live get_pubnub_usage_metrics invocation with real billing reconciliation
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Pulling actual transaction counts and reconciling against a real PubNub invoice requires a live keyset and Admin Portal billing data. The eval can verify the agent calls the MCP tool with the right parameters but cannot exercise the live data flow.

infeasible_scenarios.scenarios: End-to-end incident triage against a real production incident
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Validating the incident runbook end-to-end requires reproducing real failure modes (dropped messages, latency spikes, presence flapping) in a live environment. The eval can verify the agent follows the documented steps in order but cannot reproduce the underlying failures.

infeasible_scenarios.scenarios: Load test execution against a real keyset
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Running an actual load test that simulates 10k+ concurrent subscribers requires PubNub Support pre-coordination and a non-prod keyset with capacity. The eval can verify the agent's test scaffolding but cannot run the load test itself.
